title: Security & Responsible Disclosure
intro: We take security seriously. This page describes our posture, our reporting channel, and the scope of our responsible disclosure policy.
policy_text: We accept vulnerability reports with up to 90 days for coordination before public disclosure. In return, we commit to responding within 5 business days and publicly crediting researchers when authorized.
scope_text: Domains *.logifit.com.br and LogiFit infrastructure. Out of scope: individual tenants (contact the customer directly), social engineering, physical attacks, and DoS without proof of logic exploitation.
hall_empty: Awaiting first report — your name could be here.
